attributes.readMe:
Here is the usage documentation for the AirbnbListing card spec:

## Summary
The AirbnbListing card spec represents a listing for an Airbnb property. It includes fields for displaying the property name, location, type, price, rating, review count, guest capacity, bedroom/bed/bathroom counts, photos, amenities, description, host information, and superhost status.

## Import
```javascript
import { AirbnbListing } from '../airbnb-listing/airbnb-listing';
```

## Usage as a Field
To use the AirbnbListing card as a field within a consuming card or field:

```javascript
@field airbnbListing = linksTo(AirbnbListing);
```

## Template Usage
Inside a consuming card or field template, you can display the AirbnbListing card using the following patterns:

```hbs
{{! Isolated format }}
<@fields.airbnbListing @format="isolated" />

{{! Embedded format }}
<@fields.airbnbListing @format="embedded" />
```

The AirbnbListing card supports the following display formats:

- `isolated`: Provides a detailed view of the listing with all information displayed.
- `embedded`: Displays a compact preview of the listing, suitable for inclusion in other cards or lists.
